prompt_text: write something about marketing
make a social media post
write an email
Create a short Instagram caption for our new organic skincare line targeting millennials
Draft a 200-word LinkedIn post announcing Q1 results with 23% YoY growth, targeting CFOs and investors, include a call-to-action to download the full report
help with ads
Write a Google Ads headline for our cloud storage product that emphasizes security and 99.9% uptime, max 30 characters
create a newsletter
Draft a monthly newsletter for our SaaS customers highlighting 3 new features released in February 2026, include usage tips and a customer success story from Acme Corp
something for twitter
Write a 280-character tweet announcing our Series B funding of $45M, tag @TechCrunch and include relevant hashtags for fintech startups
marketing plan please
Create a Q2 2026 content marketing calendar for our B2B cybersecurity product, include weekly blog topics, bi-weekly webinars, and monthly whitepapers targeting CISOs in financial services
seo stuff
Generate a list of 20 long-tail keywords for our data analytics platform targeting mid-market companies, include monthly search volume estimates and content angle suggestions for each
brand voice

Define a brand voice guide for our AI startup: tone should be authoritative yet approachable, avoid jargon, target audience is non-technical C-suite executives. Include 5 do's and 5 don'ts with examples
write a case study

Write a 1000-word customer case study for our data platform: client is a Fortune 500 retailer, they reduced data processing time by 60%, migrated from legacy Hadoop cluster in 3 months, include quotes from their CTO
competitor analysis
Create a competitive analysis matrix comparing our CRM platform against Salesforce, HubSpot, and Pipedrive across 10 key features, pricing tiers, and target market segments
landing page copy

Write hero section copy for our AI-powered recruiting platform landing page: headline (max 10 words), subheadline (max 25 words), 3 bullet points highlighting key benefits, and a CTA button text. Target audience: HR directors at companies with 500+ employees
email subject lines
Generate 10 A/B test email subject lines for a product launch campaign targeting existing customers, tone should be urgent but not spammy, product is an enterprise API gateway, max 60 characters each
write press release
Draft a 500-word press release announcing our partnership with Microsoft Azure for AI workloads, include quotes from both CEOs, key partnership benefits, and availability date of March 15 2026
webinar stuff

Create an outline for a 45-minute webinar titled 'From Data Chaos to Data Intelligence' targeting data engineering managers, include 5 sections with talking points, 2 demo moments, and a Q&A structure
video script
Write a 2-minute product demo video script showcasing our real-time analytics dashboard, open with a pain point about slow reporting, demonstrate 3 key features, close with pricing and free trial CTA
Write a blog post about content marketing
Write a 1500-word SEO-optimized blog post about zero-trust security for healthcare CISOs, include 3 real-world examples, a comparison table of vendors, and end with actionable next steps
write something creative

Write a compelling product narrative for our AI meeting assistant that transforms raw meeting recordings into structured action items, tell the story from the perspective of a busy VP of Sales who used to miss follow-ups
help me write

Rewrite this paragraph to be more concise and impactful for a technical audience: 'Our platform provides various tools and capabilities that can be used by data teams to perform different types of data processing tasks in an efficient manner using distributed computing resources'
social content ideas

Generate a week's worth of LinkedIn content (5 posts) for our CEO's thought leadership profile about the future of enterprise AI adoption, each post should be 150-200 words with a unique angle and engagement hook
summarize this article

Summarize the key findings from Gartner's 2026 Magic Quadrant for Cloud Database Management Systems in 5 bullet points, highlight implications for mid-market companies considering migration from on-premise Oracle databases
edit this text for me

Proofread and improve this executive summary for clarity, grammar, and persuasiveness. Keep the same structure but make the value proposition stronger. Target reader is a CTO evaluating data platforms: 'We offer the best data platform that does everything you need for all your data workloads including ETL, analytics, ML and AI'
translate something

Translate our product one-pager from English to French, maintaining the professional B2B tone, adapting idioms for the French market, and localizing the pricing section to EUR with French formatting conventions
write a whitepaper

Create a detailed outline for a 15-page whitepaper on 'The Total Economic Impact of Migrating to a Lakehouse Architecture', include executive summary, methodology section, 4 cost-benefit categories with projected ROI over 3 years, and appendix with calculation methodology
Make some content about data

Create a 3-part blog series outline about building a modern data stack: Part 1 covers data ingestion patterns (batch vs streaming), Part 2 covers transformation with dbt and Spark, Part 3 covers serving layer and BI. Each post should be 1200 words targeting data engineers
help me with a presentation

Create a 10-slide presentation outline for a board meeting on our data strategy: slide 1 executive summary, slides 2-4 current state assessment with metrics, slides 5-7 proposed lakehouse architecture with cost projections, slides 8-9 implementation timeline, slide 10 ask and next steps
Draft a customer testimonial request email that's personal and not too pushy, for clients who've been using our platform for 6+ months with measurable results
Create a product comparison infographic outline: our platform vs 3 competitors across performance, cost, ease of use, security, and support. Visual layout should be a matrix with color-coded ratings
make something for our event

Write 3 versions of a 100-word event description for our annual Data Summit 2026 conference: one for the website hero section, one for email invitations, and one for social media. Theme is 'The Intelligence Era', featuring 50+ speakers, 3 days in San Francisco
write an ad

Create 5 Facebook ad variations for our free trial campaign: each with headline (max 40 chars), primary text (max 125 chars), and description (max 30 chars). Target audience: IT managers at companies with 100-1000 employees, pain point is data silos

Generate an email drip campaign structure for onboarding new enterprise customers: 6 emails over 30 days, specify subject line, send timing, key content, and CTA for each. Goal is to drive product adoption and reduce time-to-value
marketing ROI

Build a marketing ROI calculator framework: define the input metrics (ad spend, conversion rates, LTV, CAC), formulas for ROAS and payback period, and create a template with sample data for a B2B SaaS company spending $50K/month on paid channels
write a tagline

Generate 10 tagline options for our AI data platform rebrand. Requirements: max 6 words, convey speed and intelligence, avoid clichés like 'unleash' or 'revolutionize', tone should feel premium and enterprise-grade
influencer outreach

Draft a personalized outreach email template for tech influencers (10K-100K followers) to review our developer tool, include a value proposition for their audience, offer exclusive early access, and suggest 3 content collaboration formats
customer persona

Create 3 detailed buyer personas for our enterprise data platform: include job title, company size, pain points, buying triggers, objections, preferred content formats, and decision-making process. Personas: Data Engineering Lead, VP of Analytics, CTO
Write a product update email announcing 3 new features for our analytics platform, tone should be exciting but professional, include links to documentation and a 2-minute demo video

Create a referral program announcement for existing customers: $500 credit per successful referral, explain the process in 3 steps, include terms and conditions summary, and draft both the email and landing page copy
do some market research

Conduct a TAM/SAM/SOM analysis for our real-time data streaming product in the European market: define each segment with revenue estimates, identify top 5 verticals by opportunity size, and list key barriers to entry per region
